context: Stagnation breaker (3rd consecutive skip). Audited code-reviewer v0.1.0 against real review-engineer cron usage: skill only described local git diff workflow, but actual usage is PR-based (gh pr list/diff/merge/review) with inter-agent escalation. Updated v0.1.0→v0.1.1: added Mode B (PR Review), escalation verdict, security+idempotency checklist items, integration notes. Also pruned events.jsonl (22→12, archived evt_013–024 to events-archive.jsonl).

Brave Search 422 validation error at 01:46 UTC: search_lang 'zh' rejected, expects 'zh-hans' or 'zh-hant'. Existing gene_web_search_rate_limit only covers 429 (quota/rate). New gene documents the full valid search_lang enum and common ISO-639 pitfalls (zh→zh-hans, pt→pt-br, ja→jp). 22 genes total. Consecutive skip reset.

~18x Discord listener timeouts (03:17-04:44 UTC) covered by gene_discord_listener_timeout. 2x media path restriction (/tmp/gemini-test-cat.png) covered by gene_media_path_not_allowed. 3x Telegram startup network errors (deleteMyCommands/deleteWebhook at 03:18 UTC) — new but self-resolving with built-in 2s retry, too minor for a gene. No cron failures. No session errors. 22 genes, 15 events. Consecutive skip 1/3.

New error: [tools] process failed: write after end — 2 distinct events (4 log lines due to dual-logging) at 04:49+04:51 UTC. Process tool tried to write to stdin of an already-exited process. No existing gene covered process stream lifecycle errors. New gene documents the race condition, diagnosis, and mitigation (poll before write, use wake-event pattern). Also observed: 10x Discord listener timeouts (gene_discord_listener_timeout), 1x ENOENT WORKFLOW_AUTO.md (transient read of non-existent file), 2x rg command not found (ripgrep not installed). 23 genes total. Consecutive skip reset.

2x thread-reply target errors at 08:08 UTC — gene_message_missing_params trigger/strategy did not cover Action thread-reply requires a target variant. Hardened trigger to include thread-reply pattern, expanded strategy with thread-reply requirements (target=threadId) and thread-specific guidance. Also: 12x Discord listener timeouts (gene_discord_listener_timeout), 3x Telegram startup errors (transient, self-resolving). 23 genes total. Consecutive skip reset.

Clean idle. Gateway log has no ERRORs today. 1x sshpass command-not-found in cron (user task, not systemic). Chevereto API key format error in session (operational, V3→V4 migration). No new patterns. 23 genes, 16 events. Consecutive skip 1/3.

1x guildId required (gene_discord_components_v2_block_validation), 4x web_fetch 404 Chevereto docs (external). No cron failures. No new session errors. No new patterns. 23 genes, 17 events. Consecutive skip 2/3.

Stagnation breaker (3rd consecutive skip). Audited cc-iterator v0.1.3 against capability tree real-usage patterns. Gaps found: (1) no CI verification after push — added gh run list/view workflow, (2) self-check was vague "review cadence" — added dedicated Self-Check section with prompt template and rationale (avg 2-4 bugs/review), (3) dev prompt template lacked multi-package batching tips, (4) breakpoint resume was one-liner — expanded to step-by-step workflow. Updated v0.1.3→v0.1.4. Consecutive skip reset.

imglab skill present in repo since evt_024 but missing from both README.md and README_CN.md skill tables, and had no version in SKILL.md frontmatter. Added version 0.1.0, listed in both READMEs. 23 genes, 19 events. Consecutive skip reset.

All 20 gateway errors today match existing genes: 12x Discord listener timeout (gene_discord_listener_timeout), 3x Telegram startup errors (transient self-resolving), 4x media path restriction /tmp/test-*.png (gene_media_path_not_allowed), 2x edit exact-match failure on gemini-image SKILL.md (gene_edit_exact_match_failure). All 20 gateway errors today match existing genes: 8x Discord listener timeout (gene_discord_listener_timeout), 6x Telegram startup errors (transient self-resolving), 2x ENOENT workspace/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md (agent read from wrong path, one-off), 1x media path restriction /tmp/ (gene_media_path_not_allowed). No cron failures. No new session errors. 23 genes, 22 events. Consecutive skip 2/3.

Stagnation breaker (3rd consecutive skip). Audited chevereto-upload v0.3.0 against today's real usage (3 avatar uploads, 5 AI image uploads). Found functional bug: title sanitization (tr+sed) strips all non-ASCII chars, producing empty SAFE_NAME for Chinese titles → broken filename '/tmp/.png'. Fix: fallback to 'upload-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS' when SAFE_NAME is empty or <3 chars. Also: temp renamed files now cleaned up after upload, metadata best practices added to SKILL.md (no proxy info in descriptions, always use script). v0.3.0→v0.3.1. Consecutive skip reset.

New error: [tools] message failed: Missing Permissions — 3 events (6 log lines, dual-logged) at 11:13 UTC. Bot tried to send to Discord channel 💡丨产品 (1476874308503474267) without SEND_MESSAGES permission during new workspace setup. No existing gene covered Discord API authorization failures — gene_message_missing_params covers tool params, gene_discord_components_v2_block_validation covers payload format. New gene documents diagnosis (channel perms, overwrites, thread perms) and impact (silent message drop). Also pruned events.jsonl (24→13, archived evt_023-034). 24 genes, 13 events. Consecutive skip reset.

New error: Cannot execute action on this channel type — 6 events (3 dual-logged) at 13:58+15:57 UTC during Discord workspace setup. Agent tried actions on incompatible channel types (voice/forum/announcement). No existing gene covered channel-type compatibility. New gene documents Discord channel type IDs and per-type action restrictions. Also hardened gene_message_missing_params to cover send requires text or media (2 events at 14:59 UTC). Other signals: 12x Discord listener timeouts (gene_discord_listener_timeout), 6x Missing Permissions (gene_discord_missing_permissions), 4x Brave 429 (gene_web_search_rate_limit), 2x web_fetch 403 Cloudflare (external), 2x guildId required (gene_discord_components_v2_block_validation). 25 genes, 14 events. Consecutive skip reset.

New error: Unknown target 📰丨汇总 for Discord — 1 event at 23:01 UTC Feb 27. Agent used channel display name instead of channel ID in a cron/subagent task. No existing gene covered Discord target resolution by name (gene_subagent_telegram_target is Telegram-specific, gene_message_missing_params is about missing target). New gene documents the name→ID resolution requirement, valid target formats, and best practice of storing resolved IDs. Other signals since last PCEC: 1x subagent announce timeout (gene_subagent_announce_timeout), 2x web_fetch transient (network), 1x Brave 422 search_lang zh (gene_web_search_param_validation), 1x guildId required (gene_discord_components_v2_block_validation), 1x Discord listener timeout (gene_discord_listener_timeout). 26 genes, 15 events.
